scored_examples.label: LIKELY_PAY #1 (Good agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: Bhai salary nahi aayi abhi, next week kar dunga
scored_examples.agent_response: Thank you for confirming your commitment. We've noted your plan to pay next week after salary. Your outstanding EMI is Rs 5,000. We'll follow up then.

scores.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

scored_examples.label: LIKELY_PAY #2 (Bad agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: I will pay by next Friday for sure
scored_examples.agent_response: This is your FINAL warning. Pay immediately or legal action will be taken against you. We will arrest you.

scores.suggested_improvement: Remove all threats of legal action, police, or arrest — these violate RBI Fair Practices Code and should be replaced with constructive alternatives like offering a revised payment plan.

scored_examples.label: NEEDS_REMINDER #1 (Good agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: haan yaad hai, kitna dena hai?
scored_examples.agent_response: Your outstanding EMI amount is Rs 3,500. The due date was June 1st. You can pay via UPI, NEFT, or visit our website. Would you like help setting up a payment?

scores.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

scored_examples.label: NEEDS_REMINDER #2 (Bad agent response)
scored_examples.agent_response: You always forget! We will tell your employer about your loan default. Don't test our patience.

scores.suggested_improvement: Remove references to contacting family, employer, or using shame tactics. Focus the response on the borrower's account and available options.

scored_examples.label: DISPUTE #1 (Good agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: Amount galat hai, mera loan toh isse kam tha
scored_examples.agent_response: We take your concern seriously. Let us review your records and verify the amount. Our team will investigate and get back to you within 48 hours.

scores.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

scored_examples.label: DISPUTE #2 (Bad agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: Yeh amount wrong hai check karo
scored_examples.agent_response: Pay now or we will file a case against you. No disputes accepted. Must pay now.

scores.suggested_improvement: Remove coercive language that pressures the borrower unduly. Offer flexible payment options instead of demanding immediate payment.

scored_examples.label: HIGH_RISK #1 (Good agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: STOP CALLING ME!! I will file complaint against you!
scored_examples.agent_response: I understand your frustration, and I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience. Let me connect you with our senior resolution specialist who can better address your concerns directly.

scores.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

scored_examples.label: HIGH_RISK #2 (Bad agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: band karo phone! harass mat karo mujhe!
scored_examples.agent_response: If you don't pay by tomorrow, police will come to your house. We will arrest you. You have no choice.

scores.suggested_improvement: Remove all threats of legal action, police, or arrest — these violate RBI Fair Practices Code and should be replaced with constructive alternatives like offering a revised payment plan.

scored_examples.label: VAGUE #1 (Good agent response)
scored_examples.agent_response: We'd like to help you find a solution. Could you let us know your current situation? We have flexible payment plans that may work for you.

scores.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

scored_examples.label: VAGUE #2 (Bad agent response)
scored_examples.borrower_message: pata nahi, baad mein baat karte hain
scored_examples.agent_response: You are a fraud and a cheat. Borrow from your relatives to pay us back immediately or face consequences.

scores.suggested_improvement: Remove coercive language that pressures the borrower unduly. Offer flexible payment options instead of demanding immediate payment.

empty_response.suggested_improvement: Agent response is empty. Provide a substantive response addressing the borrower's message.

language_mismatch.suggested_improvement: Consider adding a specific next-step or follow-up date to make the response more actionable.

one_word.suggested_improvement: One-word responses are insufficient. Provide a detailed, empathetic response that addresses the borrower's specific situation.
